ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the component datasheet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of component creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of component update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., supply voltage, supply current) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the characteristic */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the characteristic (e.g., numeric, boolean) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit for the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "test_condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the test condition (e.g., V = 5.0 V, output open) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the test condition */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the test condition */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the test condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_characteristics" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the characteristic */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test condition */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the characteristic */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the characteristic */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the characteristic */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit for the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "characteristic_id", "test_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_characteristics_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "component_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type (e.g., IC, transistor, diode) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "specification_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification type */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit for the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specifications_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specifications_specification_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("specification_type_id") REFERENCES specification_types ("specification_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specification_types" (
  "specification_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification type */,
  "specification_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification type (e.g., operating temperature, storage temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the specification type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., V, A, nF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_specification_id FOREIGN KEY ("specification_id") REFERENCES component_specifications ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specification_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specification_revisions_specification_id FOREIGN KEY ("specification_id") REFERENCES component_specifications ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specification_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_specification_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specification_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specification_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specification_revisions_specification_id FOREIGN KEY ("specification_id") REFERENCES component_specifications ("specification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_characteristic_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the characteristic */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_characteristic_revisions_characteristic_id FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic_id") REFERENCES characteristics ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_characteristic_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_characteristic_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_test_condition_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test condition */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_test_condition_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_test_condition_revisions_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("test_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_test_condition_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
